name: Kostya Lymar
title: Senior Front-End Developer
summary: Senior Front-End Developer with 5+ years of experience in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Passionate about launching products from scratch to production and delivering high-quality user experiences. Responsible for full-cycle product delivery, establishing efficient development workflows, and ensuring long-term system stability post-launch.

bullets: Architected and implemented a robust monorepo solution from scratch to unify three products (marketplace, admin dashboard, and landing pages), maximizing UI component and business logic reuse across the entire ecosystem.

Developed the core architecture of a high-traffic crypto marketplace (50K+ MAU), delivering secure authentication, a multi-step order creation engine, and an advanced search infrastructure with dynamic filtering.
Built a real-time P2P communication layer using WebSockets, enabling instantaneous chat messaging and status synchronization between buyers and sellers within active transactions.

Designed and delivered a comprehensive management and arbitration admin panel featuring financial dashboards, role-based access control (RBAC), subscription management, and tools for admin dispute intervention.

Engineered performance-critical marketing landing pages using Next.js, integrating advanced product analytics, tracking scripts, and A/B testing configurations that boosted user conversion rates by ~15%.
Led and scaled a frontend engineering team of 3–5 developers, driving technical hiring, mentoring team members, and fostering a culture of high engineering standards.
Established end-to-end delivery processes, configuring reliable CI/CD pipelines, comprehensive logging, production monitoring, and strict code review workflows.
Maintained direct communication with clients, founders, PMs, BAs, and backend teams to break down high-level business goals into predictable, scalable technical roadmaps.
Independently built a high-performance, SEO-optimized marketing landing page from scratch using Next.js, driving B2B user acquisition through optimized page speed and search rankings.
Stabilized and enhanced the existing React-based admin dashboard, conducting a comprehensive code audit to fix critical bugs in business logic, broken API requests, and improper error handling.
Implemented a secure subscription and billing system via Stripe integration, developing multi-tier pricing pages, billing management, and transaction status workflows.
Developed and maintained an isolated embeddable chat widget script for client websites, ensuring clean DOM containment (Shadow DOM) and seamless WebSockets communication for real-time AI responses.
Built an Integrations Hub allowing users to connect third-party platforms (Slack, Telegram, Webhooks) to forward leads and notifications from the chatbot.
Refactored and optimized the data-fetching layer using TanStack Query, establishing robust caching, background data revalidation, and fluent state synchronization.
Improved client-side performance (LCP, TTI) through code-splitting and lazy loading, reducing overall bundle size by ~10% and optimizing widget load times by ~15%.
Integrated Sentry for comprehensive error tracking and monitoring, significantly reducing debugging time and enhancing application observability in production.
Actively contributed to building and launching the platform from scratch to production, handling a wide range of development tasks across the admin panel and marketing modules.
Built a high-performance, SEO-optimized marketing landing page using Next.js, implementing semantic HTML, custom meta tags, and responsive layouts to maximize search ranking and user conversion.
Developed an interactive Widget Builder (Alert Box, Goal Progress) allowing streamers to fully customize colors, layouts, custom sounds, typography, and animation triggers for OBS overlays.
Implemented complex OAuth integrations with Twitch, YouTube, and Kick to streamline streamer authorization, profile synchronization, and live broadcast status tracking.
Built data-heavy analytical dashboards featuring responsive data tables (1000+ rows), complex pagination, transaction filtering, and interactive financial charts for real-time revenue tracking.
Designed and implemented multi-step configuration forms with advanced validation for setting donation thresholds, custom media file constraints, and profanity filtering.
Collaborated closely with backend engineers to integrate REST APIs and WebSockets for robust global state management using Redux and reliable, real-time alert distribution.
Delivered pixel-perfect layouts from Figma designs using clean, maintainable SCSS, ensuring flawless performance and cross-browser compatibility across all device sizes.
